facts: NIT Silchar (National Institute of Technology Silchar) is located at Silchar-Hailakandi Road, District Cachar, Assam, Pin 788010.
Languages spoken: Hindi mostly, locals speak Assamese.
Climate: Humid subtropical. Hot humid summers, intense monsoons from June to September, mild dry winters.
ISBT Bus Stand is 11 km from NIT Silchar.
Silchar Airport is 25 km from NIT Silchar.
Silchar Railway Station is 15 km from NIT Silchar.
1st year: Aryabhatta Hostel (2 sharing rooms).
1st year: BH3 (single rooms).
2nd year: BH8 (3 sharing rooms).
2nd year: BH4 (3 sharing rooms).
2nd year: BH1 (3 sharing rooms).
3rd year: BH9 (blocks 9A, 9B, 9C, 9D) (2 sharing rooms).
3rd year: BH6 & BH7 (3 sharing rooms).
4th year: BH9 (single rooms).
4th year: BH6 & BH7 (single rooms).
Every hostel has its own separate mess.
Washing machines available in every hostel.

mess.cost: Rs 21,000 per semester mess advance (adjustable with mess bills)
mess.assignment: Every hostel has its own separate mess.

monday.breakfast: Idli Sambhar Chutney / Bread Butter Jam
monday.lunch: Rice, Dal, Salad (Option 1: Butter Chicken, Option 2: Butter Paneer), Milk/Egg, Curd
monday.dinner: Rice Dal Salad, Milk Sprouts Banana, Rajma Masala, Rice Kheer

tuesday.lunch: Rice Dal Salad (Option 1: Egg Curry, Option 2: Soyabin Masala), Milk/Egg
tuesday.dinner: Rice Dal Salad, Sprouts Banana, Kadhi Pakoda, Frooti

wednesday.lunch: Tea, Biscuit Rs 10 (Option 1: Chicken Masala, Option 2: Paneer Masala), Milk/Egg, Curd
wednesday.dinner: Rice Dal Salad, Sprouts Banana, Black Chana Curry, Fruit Custard

thursday.breakfast: Boil Chana Chat Suji Halwa / Bread Butter Jam
thursday.dinner: Rice Dal Salad, Banana, Aloo Tomato Rasawala, Fruit Salad

friday.lunch: Rice Dal Salad (Option 1: Chicken Masala, Option 2: Paneer Masala), Milk/Egg
friday.dinner: Rice Dal Salad, Sprouts Banana, Chhole Curry, Rasogolla

saturday.lunch: Rice Dal Salad (Option 1: Fish Curry, Option 2: Muttar Paneer), Milk/Egg, Curd
saturday.dinner: Rice Dal Salad, Sprouts Banana, Rajma Curry, Amul Masti

sunday.lunch: Rice Dal Salad (Option 1: Chicken Curry, Option 2: Paneer Curry), Milk/Egg
sunday.dinner: Rice Dal Salad, Sprouts Banana, Sev Tomato, Ice Cream/Amul Lassi

mess.notes: Both veg and non-veg options available daily. Chicken served on Monday, Wednesday, Friday, and Sunday. Fish on Saturday. Egg curry on Tuesday. Sweet or dessert served every day.
mess.cuisine: North Indian style with both veg and non-veg daily options. Breakfasts include Idli, Poha, Maggi, Upma, Sewai, Cornflakes. Desserts include Rice Kheer, Fruit Custard, Rasogolla, Fruit Salad, Ice Cream.

semester_8.additional_fees: Transcript Fee Rs 1,500 + Convocation Registration Rs 50

fee_structure.payment_method: DD in favor of Director NIT Silchar, or SBI Collect online portal

facts: LAN connectivity available in hostel rooms and labs.
Mobile network: Jio and Airtel 5G available.
75% attendance is required at NIT Silchar. Enforcement is professor/sir dependent.
November: Technosis (technical fest).
February: Incandescence (cultural fest).
Washing machines are available in every hostel.
4th year students nominate candidates.
Positions: GSS (General Secretary Sports), GST (General Secretary Technical), GSC (General Secretary Cultural), VP (Vice President), GS (General Secretary).
Volleyball, Football, Chess, Badminton, Basketball, Kho-Kho, Kabaddi, Cricket, and Athletics are available.
Every hostel has its own canteen operating 10 AM to 10 PM.
Academic canteen: FPS shops (7 shops) operating 10 AM to 9 PM.
Late registration fine of Rs 500 per day.
Fine for taking mess plate to room.
Common gym located in the sports complex.
Free for all students.
Free dispensary available.
Located near girls hostel, approximately 800 m from boys hostel.

tourist: North East states: Sikkim, Meghalaya, Tawang (popular weekend/holiday trips). No major tourist places in Silchar city itself.

facts: Hindi is mostly spoken at NIT Silchar. Locals speak Assamese.
Humid subtropical climate. Hot humid summers, intense monsoons from June to September, and mild dry winters.

academics.sections: 11 sections (A through K) split into 2 groups
academics.class_timings: 8 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday
